frozen_baseline.note: Qwen2-VL-2B before fine-tuning; α-independent (same frozen model).

generative_control.note: uniform next-token CE (rq2_qwen2vl_generative_scienceqa); a natural token-weighted rationale-plus-answer control.

notes.shape: mc_accuracy peaks at alpha=0.1 (0.780) and drops toward the high-answer-weight end (0.690 at 0.75 and 0.695 at 1.0). ROUGE-L/BLEU peak at alpha=0.1 (0.6945/0.5663) and fall as alpha rises.
notes.generative_coincidence: The best fixed point (alpha=0.1) matches the rationale-generative control in accuracy (0.780). The length-aware explanation control also reaches 0.780.
notes.explanation_supervision_helps_accuracy: The alpha=1.0 row scores 0.695 vs 0.780 at alpha=0.1 inside the rationale-shaped target. This shows that starving the rationale span hurts this prompt family, but the true answer-only control is a separate answer-only prompt and reaches 0.800.
notes.alpha_100: answer-span-only inside the rationale-shaped target: explanation span is unsupervised, so ROUGE-L/BLEU are not reported.
notes.alpha_000: explanation-only: answer span unsupervised; accuracy and rationale quality are lower than the best fixed alpha.
notes.canonical_source: Values match Tables/generated/all_results.csv and the manuscript tables generated from the final paper pipeline artifact set.
